name: Deploy Containers to Cloud Run
description: Build and deploy a containerized application to Cloud Run with automatic HTTPS, scaling, and custom domain support.
trendingReason: Cloud Run is the fastest way to deploy containers on GCP with zero infrastructure management.

steps.title: Authenticate and set the project
steps.command: gcloud auth login && gcloud config set project my-project-id
steps.description: Signs in to GCP and selects the target project.

steps.title: Enable required APIs
steps.description: Enables the Cloud Run and Artifact Registry APIs if not already active.

steps.title: Deploy from source code
steps.description: Builds the container using Cloud Build, pushes to Artifact Registry, and deploys to Cloud Run in one command.
steps.tip: If you already have an image, use --image instead of --source.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.command: gcloud run services update myservice --region us-central1 --set-env-vars "DB_HOST=10.0.0.1,NODE_ENV=production"
steps.description: Configures environment variables for the running service.

steps.title: View service URL and status
steps.command: gcloud run services describe myservice --region us-central1 --format "value(status.url)"
steps.description: Retrieves the auto-provisioned HTTPS URL for the service.

fullScript:
# Deploy to Cloud Run
gcloud auth login
gcloud config set project my-project-id
gcloud services enable run.googleapis.com artifactregistry.googleapis.com
gcloud run deploy myservice --source . --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated
gcloud run services update myservice --region us-central1 --set-env-vars "DB_HOST=10.0.0.1,NODE_ENV=production"
gcloud run services describe myservice --region us-central1 --format "value(status.url)"

faq.question: How does Cloud Run pricing work?
faq.answer: Cloud Run charges per 100ms of CPU and memory used while handling requests. Idle instances cost nothing on the default scale-to-zero configuration. The free tier includes 2 million requests per month.

faq.question: Can I use a custom domain with Cloud Run?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 'gcloud beta run domain-mappings create --service myservice --domain app.example.com --region us-central1' and add the provided DNS records.

faq.question: What is the maximum request timeout on Cloud Run?
faq.answer: The default timeout is 5 minutes, configurable up to 60 minutes using --timeout flag.
